---
title: "Shifting forest structure and composition following decades of fire exclusion in the eastern U.S.: Implications for prescribed fire restoration and wildfires"
date: "2025-06-01"
categories: ["Presentation"]
pub-authors: "Alexander, H. D., Donovan, V. M., Lamounier Moura, A., Lazzaro, L. G., **Weidig, N. C.** & Ivey, M. A."
pub-venue: "Proceedings of the 4th fire ecology and management symposium (FES-412)"
pub-details: "vol. 4"
---

::: {.nw-cite-meta}
Alexander, H. D., Donovan, V. M., Lamounier Moura, A., Lazzaro, L. G., **Weidig, N. C.** & Ivey, M. A. (2025). *Proceedings of the 4th fire ecology and management symposium (FES-412)*, vol. 4.
:::

[BibTeX](cite.bib){.nw-btn .nw-btn-ghost}
